plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX and product-site design intelligence for AI coding assistants. Includes searchable databases of styles, colors, typography, site architecture, page patterns, section patterns, charts, UX guidelines, and stack guidance for React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Three.js, Angular, and Laravel.
